task_description: Replace the mock/simulated model download in AIModelRepositoryImpl with a real HTTP download from Hugging Face using OkHttp, so that actual GGUF model files are downloaded and the chat feature works.

verification.summary: Gradle build could not execute due to network timeout downloading Gradle distribution (services.gradle.org unreachable from sandbox). No Kotlin compiler available for standalone syntax check. Code verified via semantic code review (2 passes): all imports, types, method signatures, Hilt DI annotations, structured concurrency patterns, and resource management are correct. Review issues from v1 and v2 addressed.
